purpose: Pin the end-to-end SWE-bench Pro scaling driver before spending additional solver/oracle budget.
phase_order: optional dry Pro oracle gold-patch run per instance
keep only instances with scripts present, patch_applied=true, non-empty parsed tests, fail_to_pass_status=pass, pass_to_pass_status=pass, and test_command_return_code=0
run k>1 single-agent solver attempts only for curated instances
append dataset reference gold backstop attempts
label all applying candidates through run_swe_bench_pro_oracle
run powered factorial only after a panel-annotated corpus exists
record exclusions, Docker prune results, thresholds, and report-only labels

bokken_command_template.secret_policy: export SWEBENCH_SOLVER_LITELLM_AUTH_TOKEN in the operator shell; never commit or echo token values
bokken_command_template.curate_solver_label_command: /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/.venv/bin/python /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/scripts/swebench_pro_batch_driver.py --records /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/inputs/pro-public-records.jsonl --output-dir /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/runs/<run-id> --swe-bench-pro-scripts-dir /home/bokken/SWE-bench_Pro-os/run_scripts --python-executable /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/.venv/bin/python --runner-command '/home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/.venv/bin/python /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/scripts/swebench_pro_claude_code_runner.py --prompt-template /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/docs/dual-agent/pro-corpus-generate-label-20260626/runner/claude-code-haiku-swebench-pro-prompt.md --claude-bin claude --model claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 --provider anthropic_via_unity_litellm --runner-label claude-code-litellm-haiku-real-swebench-pro-pilot --litellm-base-url https://uai-litellm.internal.unity.com --max-budget-usd 0.200000 --permission-mode bypassPermissions' --solver claude-code-litellm-haiku-real-swebench-pro-pilot --model claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 --provider anthropic_via_unity_litellm --k <attempts-per-instance> --max-budget-usd <per-instance-budget-usd> --min-good 30 --min-bad 30 --min-discordant 25 --alpha 0.05 --oracle-timeout-s 3600 --run-dry-oracle --run-solver --run-labeling --allow-live --prune-docker-between-instances

roster_curation_gate.budget_assumption: The seed pilot yielded roughly one oracle-runnable usable instance out of four attempted families, so preflight at least 100 candidate instances before expecting 30 usable instances.

scaling_thresholds.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use min_good=1 or min_bad=1 for powered claims.

panel_handoff.input: real Pro predictions corpus with single_agent_baseline_decision receipts
panel_handoff.output: panel accept/revise decisions per candidate, FAR/TAR with Wilson intervals, and at least 25 discordant pairs versus baseline before powered qualification
panel_handoff.label: report-only swe_bench_held_out_test_pass_proxy; not maintainer mergeability
